name: Dracotail Lukias
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星辰槍手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ドラゴンテイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ルキアス
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Dracotail" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Dracotail Lukias". If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Fusion Summon: You can Set 1 "Dracotail" Spell/Trap from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dracotail Lukias" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Dracotail" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Dracotail Lukias". If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Fusion Summon: You can Set 1 "Dracotail" Spell/Trap from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dracotail Lukias" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Dracotail" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Dracotail Lukias". If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Fusion Summon: You can Set 1 "Dracotail" Spell/Trap from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dracotail Lukias" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Activates if used as Fusion Material
